author: anon-ab6221f8
content: Delivered: manifest.rs module with InitManifest struct, sha256 hashing, atomic write, three-way classify_update. CLI flags --update/--dry-run/--no-prompt with clap conflicts_with. run_update() implements the full three-way merge table. Manifest written after every init/force. init-manifest.json added to gitignore. 14 new tests, all 99 init/workflow tests pass.
